title: 2/22/20 Turn comments back on dummies! KOR KIDS

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, V-Log with Kyle Pounds, the V-Log of Innocence and Purity, on February 22nd, 2020, Saturday, 11, 26 a.m.

So, uh, I feel a little bit, like, um, tired, like, I kinda made myself sick, I, I had, like, weird munchies, and I got, I'm normally a vegetarian, but I got, like, this big-ass $10 bag of fuckin' beef jerky and, like, almost ate the whole thing.

I think it made me sick, cause I'm waking up, felt kinda sick, but it could be cause I'm just overcooked from exercising, uh, so what happened was, yesterday when I did my video, uh, I did it right when I got up, and I was like, ooh, so yet, so, day before yesterday, I rode my bike for the hundred times, hundred miles in one day, and inside for the first time, so there's a comp, there's a, there's a, uh, milestone, and then the next, next day, day before yesterday,

I, um, I swam in my indoor erg 10 kilometers for the first time, so then yesterday, what I was gonna try to do was another milestone, which was swim 4k on the machine, and then bike 113 miles, cause that's the Ironman, except for the run, so then today, I was gonna see if I could run a marathon on the treadmill,

And then tomorrow, and then tomorrow, not tomorrow, but take, once I recover, try to do, um, you know, an entire indoor Ironman, and then after that, you know, it'd be cool to do an indoor Ironman, like, in the pool, and not the machine, and then,
Just little milestones like that, but, um, but yesterday, I was, oh, I forgot to close my door, I hope my roommate doesn't step outside, um, he distracts the hell out of me, um,
So, um, I, uh, um, I, uh, I wasn't at 100%, though, you know, I was kinda getting weaker, you know, I'm like, I've only been doing this a month, I, my very first day was the 18th of January, so,
Ugh, it's, it's okay for me to get wrecked, if I'm still getting wrecked, easily, after doing this for, like, two or three months, I'm gonna, that's when I'm gonna start to worry,
But for now, just after a month, if I can only go, like, three days in a row, that's fine, um, but, so I swam, uh, 4K and 118.36, I think, on my machine, just on level 3 the whole time,
And then I got on the bike, and I was gonna do 113, but, um, I could tell that I was riding slower, I didn't really have the power,
But also, I got off the bike a bunch of times, cause my internet kept going out, and I kept fiddling with my computers,
And, um, um, they weren't on top of my bike table, they were off on the other side of the room, cause I didn't anticipate my computers crashing like that,
And, uh, so that kind of took some extra time, but, um, but then my roommate barged in my room, and he's like,
Hey, aren't we going to dinner, cause my mom invited friends, and my roommate and I, to her house for dinner,
But I totally spaced it, and it was, like, 5.45, and we were supposed to be there at 6, and so,
